        have h₁ : MemLp (X₁ i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := by

          -- Use the fact that the integral of ‖X₁ i‖^(2m) is (∫ ‖X i‖^(2m))²

            have h₄ : X₁ i = (X i) ∘ Prod.fst := rfl

              -- Use the product measure property

                  -- Construct a function in the second component to form the product
                  have h₈ : MemLp (fun _ : Ω => (0 : E)) (2 * m) μ := by
                    -- The zero function is in L^(2m)

        have h₂ : MemLp (X₂ i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := by

              have h₈ : MemLp (fun x : Ω × Ω => (X i) (x.2)) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) :=
                MemLp.snd (by

        have h₃ : MemLp (X' i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := by

          have h₇ : MemLp (X' i) (2 * m) (μ.prod μ) := by
            -- Use the fact that the difference of two L^(2m) functions is in L^(2m)
            have h₈ : X' i = X₁ i - X₂ i := rfl
            rw [h₈]
            exact MemLp.sub h₅ h₆
          exact h₇
        exact h₃
